nasb.text: And when he realized this, he went to the house of Mary, the mother of John who was also called Mark, where many were gathered together and were praying.

esv.text: When he realized this, he went to the house of Mary, the mother of John whose other name was Mark, where many were gathered together and were praying.

cnv.text: 他明白了之後，就到約翰的母親馬利亞家裡去；有許多人聚集在那裡禱告。

ccb.text: 他清醒后，便到约翰·马可的母亲玛丽亚家，很多人正聚集在那里祷告。

csbs.text: 他明白之后，就到约翰的母亲玛丽亚家去，这约翰又叫马可。有许多人聚集在那里祷告。
